ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "summer_capacity_gw" REAL /* Summer capacity in gigawatts */,
  "electrical_energy_gkwh" REAL /* Electrical energy produced in gigawatt-hours */,
  "capacity_factor" REAL /* Capacity factor */,
  "growth_generating_capacity" REAL /* Yearly growth rate of generating capacity */,
  "growth_produced_energy" REAL /* Yearly growth rate of produced energy */,
  "portion_renewable_energy" REAL /* Portion of renewable electrical energy */,
  "portion_total_energy" REAL /* Portion of total electrical energy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "total_capacity_gw" REAL /* Total capacity in gigawatts */,
  "average_capacity_factor" REAL /* Average capacity factor */,
  "total_energy_production_gkwh" REAL /* Total energy production in gigawatt-hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "region_id", "facility_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., solar, wind, hydro) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy source */,
  "lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the energy source */,
  "maintenance_cost_gw" REAL /* Maintenance cost per gigawatt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity_gw" REAL /* Capacity of the facility in gigawatts */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source used by the facility */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the facility was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the facility */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the facility owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the facility owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_facilities_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_energy_data" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "energy_production_gkwh" REAL /* Energy production in gigawatt-hours */,
  "capacity_factor" REAL /* Capacity factor for the specific year */,
  "total_capacity_gw" REAL /* Total capacity of the facility for the specific year */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Maintenance cost for the specific year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., energy data, facility data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES energy_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_region" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the facility is located */,
  "region_status" TEXT /* Status of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_region_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
